nodes.name: 乌干达

nodes.name: Pink-footed puffback
nodes.summary: Pink-footed puffback（Dryoscopus angolensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Pink-footed puffback。

nodes.name: Pink-footed puffback
nodes.summary: The pink-footed puffback (Dryoscopus angolensis) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is found in western Central Africa as well as in the Albertine Rift montane forests and northern adjacent areas of Kenya, Uganda and the eastern Congo Basin. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
